title: ctenitis tenera
intro: Ctenitis tenera is a species of fern native to Asia, characterized by its delicate and lacy fronds. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Ctenitis tenera is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
